userId.description: The user's email, acting as the unique ID.

pin.description: The 4-digit security PIN (would be hashed in a real production app).

AppSettings.title: AppSettings
AppSettings.description: Stores global configuration for the application.

theme.description: The color theme for the application.

invoiceDaysMonthly.description: Days before expiry to generate monthly invoices.

invoiceDaysYearly.description: Days before expiry to generate yearly invoices.

simCostPerDevice.description: The cost of a single SIM card for automated expense tracking.

monthlyYearlyThreshold.description: The renewal fee amount that separates a monthly from a yearly plan.

Dealer.title: Dealer
Dealer.description: Represents a dealer who can be allocated stock.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Dealer entity.

phone.description: The phone number of the dealer.

address.description: The physical address of the dealer.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the dealer was added.

StockAllocation.title: StockAllocation
StockAllocation.description: Represents the allocation of inventory items to a specific dealer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StockAllocation entity.

inventoryItemId.description: Reference to the InventoryItem model (e.g., 'GT06 Tracker').

quantity.description: The quantity of a bulk item allocated.

allocatedImeis.description: A list of specific IMEIs allocated (for trackers).

allocatedSims.description: A list of specific SIMs allocated.

allocatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the allocation was made.

allocatedBy.description: Name of the admin who made the allocation.

DevicePlan.title: DevicePlan
DevicePlan.description: Stores the subscription details for a specific device.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DevicePlan entity.

traccarDeviceId.description: ID of the device in the server.

renewalFee.description: The amount to be charged at every renewal.

notes.description: Notes related to the device plan.

discount.description: Discount amount to be applied to the subscription fee.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the device plan was created.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents an invoice, which can be for a single device or a combination of devices for the same customer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Invoice entity.

deviceIds.description: List of device IDs included in this invoice.

customerIdentifier.description: A unique customer identifier (e.g., phone number) for grouping.

periodStart.description: The earliest start date of the billing periods included.

periodEnd.description: The latest end date of the billing periods included.

paidAt.description: Timestamp of when the invoice was paid.

paidBy.description: Name of the admin who marked the invoice as paid.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the invoice was created.

extensionDays.description: Number of days the subscription was extended.

extensionGrantedAt.description: Timestamp of when the extension was granted.

InvoiceItem.title: InvoiceItem
InvoiceItem.description: Represents a single billable item on an invoice, typically a device renewal.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InvoiceItem entity.

deviceId.description: The specific device this line item is for.

description.description: Description of the invoice item (e.g., 'Subscription Renewal for ABC-123').

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Represents a business expense or a person-specific transaction.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Expense entity.

inventoryItemId.description: Reference to the InventoryItem if this is a stock purchase.

title.description: Title or name of the expense.

amount.description: The monetary value of the expense.

date.description: The date the expense was incurred.

monthId.description: Identifier for the month of the expense, e.g., '2024-07'.

status.description: The approval status of the expense.

createdBy.description: Name of the user who created the expense entry.

personId.description: Reference to the Person if this is a person-specific transaction.

dealerId.description: Reference to the Dealer if this is a commission.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction for a person (payment or receipt).

Sale.title: Sale
Sale.description: Represents a new device sale and installation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Sale entity.

amount.description: Total amount paid for the sale.

simNumber.description: Phone number of the installed SIM card.

imsi.description: IMSI of the installed SIM card.

phoneRobocall.description: Phone number used for automated robocall alerts.

contactNumber.description: Primary contact number for the customer.

createdBy.description: Name of the admin who logged the sale.

dealerId.description: ID of the dealer who made the sale.

commission.description: Commission amount paid to the dealer.

status.description: The current status of the subscription.

unsubscribedAt.description: Timestamp of when the subscription was ended.

unsubscribeReason.description: The reason for ending the subscription.

CompanyVehicle.title: CompanyVehicle
CompanyVehicle.description: Represents a new device installation for a company vehicle.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CompanyVehicle entity.

customerName.description: The name of the customer (often internal department).

simNumber.description: Phone number of the installed SIM card.

imsi.description: IMSI of the installed SIM card.

phoneRobocall.description: Phone number used for automated robocall alerts.

contactNumber.description: Primary contact number for the vehicle user.

createdBy.description: Name of the admin who logged the installation.

Log.title: Log
Log.description: Represents an audit log entry for an admin action.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Log entity.

action.description: A description of the action performed by the admin.

adminName.description: The name of the admin who performed the action.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the log entry was created.

SimCard.title: SimCard
SimCard.description: A SIM card with its number and IMSI.

InventoryItem.title: InventoryItem
InventoryItem.description: Represents an item in the company's inventory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the inventory item.

name.description: Name of the item (e.g., 'GT06 Tracker', 'Jazz SIM').

type.description: The category of the inventory item.

quantity.description: Total quantity in stock. For trackers and SIMs, this is derived from the count of unique identifiers.

supplier.description: The supplier from whom the item was purchased.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of when the item was last updated.

imeis.description: A list of unique IMEI numbers for tracker items.

sims.description: A list of SIM card details for SIM items.

ApprovalRequest.title: ApprovalRequest
ApprovalRequest.description: Represents a request for a critical action that requires multi-user approval.

CustomCommand.title: CustomCommand
CustomCommand.description: Represents a reusable command that can be sent to devices.

name.description: A user-friendly name for the command.

command.description: The raw command string to be sent to the device.

Person.title: Person
Person.description: Represents an employee or a business partner.

LedgerEntry.title: LedgerEntry
LedgerEntry.description: Represents a financial transaction for a person.

/userPins/{userId}.description: Stores security PINs for individual users, with the user's email as the document ID.

/appSettings/main.description: Stores a single document containing global application settings.

/stockAllocations/{allocationId}.description: Stores records of inventory allocated to different dealers.

/invoices/{invoiceId}.description: Stores invoice records. Can be for one or more devices for the same customer.

/invoiceItems/{itemId}.description: Stores the line items for a specific invoice, where each item corresponds to a device renewal.

/sales/{saleId}.description: Stores records of new device sales and installations.

/companyVehicles/{vehicleId}.description: Stores records of company vehicle installations.

/logs/{logId}.description: Stores audit trail records of admin activities.

/inventory/{itemId}.description: Stores all inventory items, including trackers, SIMs, and accessories.

/approvalRequests/{requestId}.description: Stores requests for critical actions that require multi-user approval.

/customCommands/{commandId}.description: Stores custom reusable commands for devices.

/persons/{personId}/ledgers/{ledgerId}.description: Stores financial transactions for a specific person, which is now deprecated in favor of storing them in the Expenses collection.
